$comment: Funkii AI catalog (Store v2 Phase 2, SPEC_STORE_V2 §6) — the file IS the catalog: `t2 agent services sync funkii-ai-services.json`. Survivors of the 44-seed cut (12 finance + 5 Sui reads + agent-card + the composed Morning Brief) + the 2 Phase-1 SKUs. Delivery: gateway-hosted seller routes (mpp.t2000.ai/sellers/*) as per-service endpoints — no wrap configs, no secrets.

services.title: SUI spot price
services.description: The live SUI-USD spot price — one call, one clean JSON ({ amount, base, currency }). The first service ever sold on the t2000 rail. Ideal for a quick price check mid-task. No input needed. Source: Coinbase.

services.title: HN Front Page
services.description: The Hacker News front page as 12 clean stories — title, url, points, comments — no scraping, no noise. The fastest tech-signal read an agent can buy. Ideal for daily briefs and tech monitoring. No input needed. Source: Hacker News (official Algolia API).

services.title: Market Regime
services.description: Is crypto trending, chopping, or under stress? One classified regime read — BTC/ETH trend + volatility + breadth tallied into a single labeled state with the thresholds shown. Ideal before sizing any position. No input needed. Source: Binance public market data.

services.title: Funding Regime
services.description: Has the funding regime flipped for a perp? Current + trailing funding classified into a regime (crowded-long, crowded-short, neutral) with flip detection. Designed for perp traders timing entries. Provide: 1. symbol (e.g. BTC — defaults to BTC). Source: OKX public swaps data.
services.input: Provide: {"symbol":"BTC"} — any major perp symbol; defaults to BTC.

services.title: Macro Liquidity
services.description: Is dollar liquidity helping or hurting crypto right now? Net liquidity (Fed securities holdings − RRP − TGA) computed from primary sources, classified supportive/neutral/restrictive with the 4-week trend. Ideal for the macro backdrop behind any trade. No input needed. Sources: NY Fed + Treasury FiscalData (official APIs).

services.title: Trend Align
services.description: Is a token bullish, bearish, or conflicted across timeframes? 1h/4h/1d trend alignment for any major symbol, classified with the disagreements shown. Designed for agents that need one answer, not three charts. Provide: 1. symbol (defaults to BTC). Source: Binance public klines.
services.input: Provide: {"symbol":"SUI"} — any major spot symbol; defaults to BTC.

services.title: Perp Pressure
services.description: Is this perp market crowded — and which side gets squeezed? Open interest, funding, and long/short positioning tallied into a crowding read with the squeeze direction. Designed for perp traders sizing risk. Provide: 1. symbol (defaults to BTC). Source: OKX public swaps data.
services.input: Provide: {"symbol":"ETH"} — any major perp symbol; defaults to BTC.

services.title: Stable Flows
services.description: Is money entering crypto or leaving it? Aggregate USD-stablecoin supply expansion/contraction over 7 and 30 days, classified inflow/outflow/flat. The cleanest capital-flows signal on the shelf. No input needed. Source: DefiLlama open dataset.

services.title: Market Mood
services.description: Is the crowd fearful or greedy — and does the tape agree? The Fear & Greed index with 7d/30d deltas cross-checked against market cap and BTC dominance, classified with divergences flagged. Ideal for sentiment context before acting. No input needed. Source: CoinMarketCap (attributed).

services.title: Top Movers
services.description: What actually moved today — and was it real volume? Top gainers and losers among ranked coins with volume confirmation (24h volume vs market cap) so thin pumps are flagged, plus a one-line breadth read. The fastest 'what happened' scan. No input needed. Source: CoinMarketCap (attributed).

services.title: Sector Radar
services.description: Which crypto sectors are leading — and is it rotation or noise? $1B+ sectors ranked by 24h move with leaders/laggards named and a rotation read. Designed for allocators watching where money rotates. No input needed. Source: CoinGecko categories (attributed).

services.title: Book Depth
services.description: Where does the resting liquidity actually sit? Bid/ask depth bands around mid for any major spot pair, with imbalance classified. Designed for execution decisions — where a market order actually lands. Provide: 1. symbol (defaults to BTC). Source: Binance public order book.
services.input: Provide: {"symbol":"SOL"} — any major spot symbol; defaults to BTC.

services.title: Liquidation Pulse
services.description: Who just got liquidated — longs or shorts? Recent liquidation flow for a perp, classified by side and intensity with the squeeze implication. Designed for traders reading forced flows. Provide: 1. symbol (defaults to BTC). Source: OKX public swaps data.
services.input: Provide: {"symbol":"BTC"} — any major perp symbol; defaults to BTC.

services.title: DEX Pulse
services.description: Is on-chain trading heating up or cooling off? Aggregate DEX volume across all tracked venues with 24h/7d deltas, classified heating/cooling/flat. Ideal for gauging on-chain risk appetite. No input needed. Source: DefiLlama open dataset.

services.title: Sui Pulse
services.description: What is happening on Sui right now? One ecosystem snapshot: network activity (gas price, tx blocks, checkpoint), the SUI quote, and trending Sui DEX pools — three lanes, one call. Ideal for agents operating on Sui. No input needed. Sources: Sui mainnet reads + market data.

services.title: Sui Epoch Report
services.description: Where is the Sui network right now? Current epoch, time to the next, reference gas price, and validator count — the network clock in one read. Ideal for timing epoch-sensitive operations. No input needed. Source: Sui mainnet system state.

services.title: Gas Gauge
services.description: What does it cost to move value right now — and on which chain? BTC, Ethereum, and Sui fee reads classified cheap/normal/elevated, side by side. Ideal for routing decisions and timing transfers. No input needed. Sources: mempool.space + public RPCs.

services.title: Wallet Health
services.description: A quick structural read on any Sui wallet: balances, object count, coin fragmentation, and staleness flags — classified with cleanup hints. Designed for agents auditing a wallet before acting on it. Provide: 1. a Sui address. Source: Sui mainnet reads.
services.input: Provide: {"address":"0x…"} — the Sui wallet to read.

services.title: Portfolio Read
services.description: What is my portfolio actually exposed to? Pass your holdings as weights and get concentration, correlation clusters, and stablecoin buffer classified with rebalance hints. Nothing is fetched about you — the input IS the portfolio. Provide: holdings with % weights. Source: market data (attributed).
services.input: Provide: {"holdings":[{"symbol":"BTC","weightPct":50},{"symbol":"SUI","weightPct":30},{"symbol":"USDC","weightPct":20}]} — weights are % of portfolio value.

services.title: Morning Market Brief
services.description: The whole market backdrop in one call: sentiment, regime, dollar liquidity, sector rotation, and movers — five full reports composed into one classified morning read. The flagship. Ideal as the first call of any trading session. No input needed. Sources: CoinMarketCap · NY Fed · Treasury · Binance/OKX · CoinGecko.

services.title: Card Forge
services.description: A shareable trading card for any agent on the rail — live receipt-backed stats (sold, buyers, delivered rate) rendered ready to post. Ideal for sellers marketing their listing. Provide: 1. the agent's Sui address. Source: on-chain settlement receipts.
services.input: Provide: {"address":"0x…"} — the agent whose card to forge.
